description: The HR department's Oracle database has accumulated data quality issues following a recent system migration. Connect to the HR database (host=localhost, port=1521, database=XEPDB1, username=hr, password=hr123). Investigate the employee records for all categories of integrity violations, remediate every issue you find, and produce a comprehensive audit report at /home/ga/Desktop/hr_audit_report.txt that documents each problem category discovered, the affected employee IDs, and the corrective actions taken.
